items.message: No unit test failures detected on main (HEAD: 1cff9ac9baf9c972d75b3fba2be36b694554d55e, 2026-04-13). The only CI pipeline failures found are: (1) js - openai (Build Build) and js - resources - mgmt (Build Build) — both failing with pipeline artifact packaging errors ("Path does not exist: /mnt/vss/_work/_temp/packages-dev-publish", "Manifest generation failed"), not test failures. All UnitTest jobs for resources-mgmt passed (49/49). OpenAI has RunUnitTests: false in ci.yml. (2) js - attestation — failed in Integration PublishDocsToNightlyBranch (doc publishing), all 151 unit tests passed. No new GitHub issue was created.
